description: App Store Connect API as MCP: apps, TestFlight, subscriptions, localizations, reports. JWT auth.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.beautyfree/app-store-connect

environmentVariables.description: API Key ID from App Store Connect (Users and Access → Integrations → App Store Connect API)
environmentVariables.name: APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Issuer ID from App Store Connect
environmentVariables.name: APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Path to your .p8 private key file (downloaded from App Store Connect)
environmentVariables.name: APP_STORE_CONNECT_P8_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Vendor number; required for sales and finance reports only
environmentVariables.name: APP_STORE_CONNECT_VENDOR_NUMBER
